sentences.arabic: العَسَلُ دَوَاءٌ طَبِيعِيٌّ مَعْرُوفٌ مُنْذُ القِدَمِ.
sentences.translation: Med je prirodni lijek poznat od davnina.
sentences.translationEn: Honey is a natural remedy known since ancient times.

sentences.arabic: يَأْكُلُ النَّاسُ العَسَلَ فِي الصَّبَاحِ عَلَى مَعِدَةٍ فَارِغَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi jedu med ujutro na prazan stomak.
sentences.translationEn: People eat honey in the morning on an empty stomach.

sentences.translation: Miješaju ga s toplom vodom ili mlijekom.
sentences.translationEn: They mix it with warm water or milk.

sentences.translation: Med je koristan za grlo i kašalj.
sentences.translationEn: Honey is beneficial for the throat and cough.
